586: /// Get seconds since the last commit on a branch. Returns None if no commits or error.
587: pub fn log_oneline_time(branch: &str) -> Option<u64> {
588:     let output = run_git(&["log", "-1", "--format=%ct", branch]).ok()?;
589:     let timestamp: u64 = output.trim().parse().ok()?;
590:     let now = std::time::SystemTime::now()
591:         .duration_since(std::time::UNIX_EPOCH)
592:         .ok()?
593:         .as_secs();
594:     Some(now.saturating_sub(timestamp))
595: }
